creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Hi

I can confirm on my system what Ben has reported:
- lang/gcc sucessfully built with MULTILIB OFF, BOOSTRAP ON

Although I still couldn't build net/kea for validation purpose like Ben since it failed to build the boost-libs dependency. (But's that's more likely me who has made an erro at another point.

My build run only packaged lang/gcc first, I added net/kea later and re-ran. Thus I can't say if building net/kea with lang/gcc in one run wouldn't have worked like Ben reported.

I agree even more with Ben now, that the issue points more in the direction of lang/gcc but the findings here so far look helpful for the analysis.

In the meantime I'd "vote" for closing this particular PR and point to bug #209963 which focuses on the issues found with lang/gcc.

-- Mathieu
